Track\",\"weight\":1}],\"id\":8,\"name\":\"ATOM Economic Zone Quadratic Grant Round 7\",\"startFrom\":1746284400000,\"endTo\":1759935600000,\"detail\":\"# Update on Matching Fund Pool for AEZ Quadratic Grant Program \\n\\nFollowing the recent announcement by Atom Accelerator DAO(AADAO) regarding its planned sunset ([see official announcement](https://x.com/ATOMAccelerator/status/1857494873592705246)), **there may be unforeseen impacts on the matching fund pool for MACI Voting results in the upcoming rounds (Rounds 5–11) of the AEZ Quadratic Grant program**.\\n\\nThe matching fund pool, which was previously committed by AADAO, could be affected in terms of the promised funding amount or the timing of disbursements. Please note that DoraHacks, as the infrastructure provider and operator of the Grant Program, holds no liability for any potential decrease in the total funding amount for each round. We appreciate your understanding and will continue to provide updates as more information becomes available. \\n\\n# Intro\\n\\nAEZ Quadratic Grant is a long-term program that aims to support the sustainable development of public goods and Appchains in the ATOM Economic Zone. We firmly believe that even small contributions can help shape the future of the vast ATOM ecosystem, and ultimately give rise to new cornerstone applications within Cosmos.\\n\\nFollowing the passing of [Cosmos Proposal #917](https://www.mintscan.io/cosmos/proposals/917), a substantial allocation of **80,000 ATOM** has been secured for funding public good and appchain builders in the ATOM Economic Zone. Additionally, with robust backing from [**Atom Accelerator (AADAO)**](https://www.atomaccelerator.com/), an extra **$200,000** will also be committed to the prize pool, distributing $20,000 for each round to further empower the public good builders. **This funding is set to support 10 successive rounds of quadratic funding at [AEZ Quadratic Grant](https://dorahacks.io/aez), starting from Round 2 to Round 11 in 24 months.** \\n\\n**All types of public goods/appchain projects contributing to the Cosmos ecosystem are welcome to apply for a grant**. Continue reading below for more information about rules and quadratic governance. \\n\\nIn Round 7, **8,000 ATOM + 20,000 USDC** will be provided for the matching fund pool (Round 7 contribution is open until **October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC**). The funds are composed of:\\n\\n1. Funds secured from Cosmos Proposal#917 (80,000 ATOM for 10 consecutive funding rounds);\\n2. Donation from AADAO (200,000 USDC for 10 consecutive funding rounds)\\n\\n*For any questions, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/gKT5DsWwQ5) or [Telegram](https://t.me/dorahacksofficial) chat to find support.* \\n\\n# **Round 7 Timeline (Updated)**\\n\\n![AEZ R7 timeline.jpg](https://cdn.dorahacks.io/static/files/19961f6117b92a73064668f472cb8fb6.jpg)\\n\\nRound 7 BUIDL Submission: By September 14th, 2025\\n\\nBUIDL Review Period:  August 31st - September 24th, 2025\\n\\nProject Demo & Campaign:  September 24th - October 8th, 2025\\n\\nRound 7 Contribution Period:  May 3rd - October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC \\n\\n**Round 7 Cutoff time: October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC** \\n\\nAnti-sybil Attack Check & Result Announcement: October 8th - October 15th\\n\\nRound 8 kickoff time: October 8th, 2025\\n\\n**Notes:**\\n\\n1. Contributions made before the Round 7 Cutoff time **(October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC)** will impact the distribution of Round 7 matching fund pool; if made after the cutoff time, they will be counted for the **next** round and impact the distribution of Round 7 matching fund pool. The contribution portal for active grantees is permanently open.\\n2. All the approved BUIDLs in the previous round will still enter this round to be funded, as long as they’re **Active BUIDLs**. When a BUIDL stops updating or has received a major funding externally, it’ll be **Archived**. \\n\\n# **Tracks**\\n\\nThere will be no specific tracks given for hackers, instead, **this Grant is all-embracing for every kind of solid project idea**.\\n\\nHowever, you still need to specify your project type in the project description section, such as what problem it solves, and what kind of users it serves.\\n\\n# **How to Apply**\\n\\n## **Submit Your Application**\\n\\nClick the “Submit BUIDL” button above on the page to submit your project for application. You’ll be asked to connect your **Keplr** wallet before filling out a submission form. Please make sure the wallet you’re using is valid and available for receiving grant prizes and community contributions after the grant round.\\n\\n## **Requirements for Applications**\\n\\n**Must-haves**\\n\\n1. Active Github repos. **(If your repo cannot be open source at the moment, please contact us via Telegram @dorahackofficial)**\\n2. A video demo of your project, in no less than 1 minute.\\n3. Identification of the use of Cosmos Interchain ecosystem or infrastructure.\\n\\n**Nice-to-haves**\\n\\n1. More information of your team members.\\n2. Actual usable demo with frontend, if applicable\\n3. Smart contract address if this project has been deployed on any chain.\\n\\n# Grantee eligibility\\n\\n1. Funding Threshold: Applicants must have received less than $1.5 million in total from venture capitals and previous grants.\\n2. Commercialization: Projects must not be commercialized or have tokens listed.\\n3. Ecosystem Focus: Projects must specifically contribute to the AEZ ecosystem.\\n4. Project Categories: There are no restrictions on project categories. Applications can be from either technical or non-technical projects.\\n    \\n# **Exit/Disqualification**\\n\\n1. **Failure to Accomplish Commitment:** Grantees who do not complete most tasks in their commitment may be unlisted from the grant program.\\n2. **Community Review Failure:** Candidates reported as ineligible during the Community Review Period and verified as true will be disqualified.\\n3. **Major Fundraising:** Grantees receiving additional funding that brings their total past $1.5 million must exit the AEZ Quadratic Grant.\\n4. **Commercialization:** Grantees that commercialize their project or list a token must exit and will be deemed no longer eligible for the program. \\n\\n# **Community review**\\n\\n**Community should review from following aspects:** \\n\\n- **Entry eligibility**\\n- **Project quality**\\n- **Project’s current/potential contribution to the ATOM ecosystem**\\n- **Feasibility of the commitment proposal**\\n\\nIf any candidates are found ineligible during this period, they may be excluded. **Feedback after this period will not be considered for this round.**\\n\\n# **Pioneer of QF Practice for Cosmos Ecosystem**\\n\\n**What’s QF?** Quadratic funding is an on-chain funding distribution mechanism based on the result of [quadratic governance](https://research.dorahacks.io/2022/07/11/quadratic-governance), an innovative governance scheme that is often considered an improvement of the traditional 1-person-1-vote or 1-dollar-1-vote model. With a quadratic voting algorithm, the power of each vote to a single project from a single contributor will decrease, which would prevent funding distribution from extreme preferences of whale voters.\\n\\nFor more details, please read [Quadratic Funding&Voting Guide](https://hidorahacks.medium.com/what-is-quadratic-voting-funding-how-did-we-improve-it-70989e813cf9)\\n\\n**As pioneers of QF implementation,** Dora Factory and DoraHacks are the first (and maybe the only in a lot of senses) practitioners to support QF on both EVM and non-EVM compatible blockchains. In 2023, Dora Factory and DoraHacks brought the first QF round to the Cosmos by an Archway-native Quadratic Funding Round.\\n\\nFor more detailed information about QF, please check out this article, **[Building Effective On-Chain Governance Mechanisms: Examples of Quadratic Governance and Innovations from DoraHacks](https://dorahacks.io/blog/news/qf-retrospective/).** \\n\\n# **Contribute to Make an Impact on Important AEZ Public Goods!**\\n\\n**Contribution portal for active grantees is always open. [How to contribute>>](https://dorahacks.io/blog/guides/aez-quadratic-grant-contribution/)**\\n\\nYou can always make contributions (votes), whether there are upcoming quadratic funding rounds or not. Quadratic funding rounds will happen periodically. Your contributions **will have an impact on the distribution of the next latest QF matching fund pool** (and your contributions will be sent to the project you vote for directly). Here's how your contributions can make a difference:\\n\\n```\\n1. Contribute before a Round Due Date: By contributing prior to the Round Due Date, your contributions will directly influence the distribution of the current Grant round.\u003Cbr>\\n\\n2. Contribute after a Round Due Date: If you contribute after a Round Due Date, your contributions will be recorded and will have an impact on the fund distribution in the subsequent funding round.\\n```\\n\\nBy actively participating in the Quadratic Funding Grant, you can play a vital role in shaping the future of the Cosmos community. Your contributions, regardless of their size, have the power to make a tangible impact on important AEZ public goods. Join us in building a brighter and more sustainable future for the Cosmos ecosystem.\\n\\n***Please check out [Contribution Guide](https://dorahacks.io/blog/guides/aez-quadratic-grant-contribution/) to learn how to support your favorite projects.***\\n\\nDora Vota tokens may be asked for gas fees/tx fees when contributing. Please check out token details at CoinGecko . Donation from AADAO (200,000 USDC for 10 consecutive funding rounds)\\n\\n*For any questions, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/gKT5DsWwQ5) or [Telegram](https://t.me/dorahacksofficial) chat to find support.* \\n\\n# **Round 7 Timeline (Updated)**\\n\\n![AEZ R7 timeline.jpg](https://cdn.dorahacks.io/static/files/19961f6117b92a73064668f472cb8fb6.jpg)\\n\\nRound 7 BUIDL Submission: By September 14th, 2025\\n\\nBUIDL Review Period:  August 31st - September 24th, 2025\\n\\nProject Demo & Campaign:  September 24th - October 8th, 2025\\n\\nRound 7 Contribution Period:  May 3rd - October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC \\n\\n**Round 7 Cutoff time: October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC** \\n\\nAnti-sybil Attack Check & Result Announcement: October 8th - October 15th\\n\\nRound 8 kickoff time: October 8th, 2025\\n\\n**Notes:**\\n\\n1. Contributions made before the Round 7 Cutoff time **(October 8th, 2025, at 3 PM UTC)** will impact the distribution of Round 7 matching fund pool; if made after the cutoff time, they will be counted for the **next** round and impact the distribution of Round 7 matching fund pool. The contribution portal for active grantees is permanently open.\\n2. All the approved BUIDLs in the previous round will still enter this round to be funded, as long as they’re **Active BUIDLs**. When a BUIDL stops updating or has received a major funding externally, it’ll be **Archived**. \\n\\n# **What's MACI?**\\n\\nThe Minimal Anti-Collusion Infrastructure (MACI) is a secure, private, on-chain voting system designed to minimize cheating risks like bribery and collusion. Using zero-knowledge proofs, MACI ensures receipt-free voting, making it so only the vote coordinator can verify individual votes while allowing anyone to verify overall results. This makes MACI particularly valuable for governance and funding events, ensuring fair and transparent outcomes.\\n\\n**What’s the difference between regular grant program Quadratic Funding (QF) and MACI-QV?**\\n\\nIn regular QF (Quadratic Funding), voters will need to use certain tokens (such as ATOM) to cast votes while make direct contributions to the grantees. The contribution portal for active grantees is always open. [How to contribute>>](https://dorahacks.io/blog/guides/aez-quadratic-grant-contribution/) To learn more, switch to the “Detail” tab for more information.\\n\\nIn the AEZ Quadratic Grant Round 7, part of the grant funding pool (20,000 USDC) will be distributed based on MACI voting results, the other part (8,000 ATOM) will be decided by the regular Quadratic Funding results at https://dorahacks.io/aez/maci-voting/results\\n\\n![Frame 1912056534.jpg](https://cdn.dorahacks.io/static/files/196ccfa5e8cb99e7e6a2e894132b9f6f.jpg)\\n\\n# **Contact Us**\\n\\n**1.** **How to contact DoraHacks team?**\\n\\n- Discord: https://discord.gg/gKT5DsWwQ5\\n- Telegram: https://t.me/dorahacksofficial\\n\\n**2.** **How do I get information about the progress of an event/BUIDL?**\\n\\n- Join [DoraHacks Discord](https://discord.gg/gKT5DsWwQ5)\\n- Subscribe to DoraHacks [Twitter](https://twitter.com/DoraHacks), [Binance Live](https://www.binance.com/en/live/u/24985985), [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/c/DoraHacksGlobal)\",\"reviewTime\":1757862000,\"demoTime\":1758729600,\"tallyEndTime\":1760540400,\"maciAmount\":20000}}",[104,105,106,107,108,109,110,111,112,113,114,115,116],14866,35139,34487,34522,26176,31115,25970,25771,12968,5330,14323,18276,14637,{"buidlTrendings":118,"grantTags":119,"topCollectionList":120,"collection":121,"focusedCollection":6,"communityLeaderboard":123,"buidlVoters":127},[],[],[],{"list":122,"count":14,"page":14,"loadedAll":13},[],{"page":26,"loading":13,"filter":124,"list":125},{},{"next":15,"count":14,"results":126},[],{"buidlId":6,"page":26,"loading":13,"list":128},{"next":15,"count":14,"upvotes":129,"upvoters":26,"results":130},"0.00",[]]</script>
